caption: A person's hand enters the frame to point at a white informational display board. The board features a central green circle containing the text "Powerful Chips that Consume Orders of Magnitude less Power," surrounded by several categories arranged in a radial diagram. These categories include "Food & Cosmetics," "Substance Abuse," "Oncology," "Non Inv Diab," "Exercise Monitoring," "Outdoor Exposure," and "Internal Air Quality." Small illustrative images are associated with each category, such as a medical diagram of the human body under "Oncology" and "Substance Abuse," and a picture of a building under "Internal Air Quality." As the sequence progresses, a hand appears from the left, pointing toward the "Food & Cosmetics" section. The camera angle shifts slightly, focusing more closely on the central text and the surrounding categorical labels as the person interacts with the board.
